name: create-diolog-content
description: Write any content in Diolog's company voice, routed through four register personas: long-form A4 guide copy (the master files create-diolog-guides renders), articles/blog posts (investor education, IR best practice, thought leadership, announcements), website + email marketing copy, and buyer-facing business cases. Successor to the diolog-brand-voice skills, rebuilt on the create-amy-content architecture: one evidence-anchored base voice (plain and literal beats clever, the skim test, epigram budgets, verbatim positioning beats, measured confidence shown never stated, spaced hyphen never em dashes, AU English) synthesised from the team voice guide, the live diolog.app copy, and Amy's line-by-line 2026-07 review of shipped AI-drafted long-form; a review ledger that compounds future corrections; the July 2026 empirical anti-AI-writing research layer; and a deterministic voice lint with per-register format budgets. v1.0.1 adds the stylometric fingerprint extracted from ~26k words of the live diolog.com.au corpus (marketing pages, non-legal help articles, all blog articles; AI-drafted resources excluded). v1.1 adds the revision protocol (item-by-item feedback disposition - applied/overruled/routed-and-landed - plus restatement and duplication sweeps) after the guide revision validated clean on copy rules but evaporated routed design feedback, left a stale spec restatement, and duplicated an epigram across a spread; ledger entries 10-12 record the classes.
